message:
refactor(codegen): Migrate unittest/assertions.zig to builder patterns

- Add emitCallWithArgs and emitMethodWithArgs helpers
- Migrate self.method(args) pattern to builder
- Migrate builtin type methods (int, float, bool, iter, filter, etc.)
- Migrate callable.call(args) pattern to builder
- Migrate runtime function call patterns
- Reduced raw emit(")") calls from 23 to 10

Remaining patterns are in complex inline block contexts.
